"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\nexon_mini_server.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\ADMIN\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-12.1.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-10.0.0-r3\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\nexon_mini_server.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\nexon_mini_server.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\ADMIN\Downloads\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-12.1.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-10.0.0-r3\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\nexon_mini_server.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o nexon_mini_server.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libnexon_mini_server.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\nexon_mini_server.dir\linkLibs.rsp
